title: STOP Using Claude to Code. Do THIS Instead.
summary: Austin Marchese argues that Claude Code is misunderstood as a coding tool when it should be the foundation for a personal AI operating system that learns workflows, retains context, and improves with repeated use. He advocates building owned, compounding AI systems rather than relying on generic AI services, and promotes his BuildPartner.ai platform as infrastructure for faster development.
